docs:
Add to the `html_helpers` function in your `my_app_web.ex`:

    import MyAppWeb.Components.UI.Tooltip

Replace `MyAppWeb` with your application's module prefix.

files.content:
defmodule MyAppWeb.Components.UI.Tooltip do use Phoenix.Component attr :id, :string, default: nil attr :content, :string, required: true attr :side, :string, default: "top", values: ~w(top bottom left right) attr :class, :string, default: nil slot :inner_block, required: true def tooltip(assigns) do ~H"""
{render_slot(@inner_block)}
{@content}
""" end defp tooltip_position("top"), do: "bottom-full left-1/2 -translate-x-1/2 mb-2" defp tooltip_position("bottom"), do: "top-full left-1/2 -translate-x-1/2 mt-2" defp tooltip_position("left"), do: "right-full top-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 mr-2" defp tooltip_position("right"), do: "left-full top-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 ml-2" end

name: tooltip
title: Tooltip
